effect_replication.tweet_text: Midjourney → Particle magic with @threejs. I generate an image with Midjourney, reconstruct a point cloud with AI from it, then render it with Threejs. TSL handles the math.
effect_replication.goal: Replicate the aesthetic and particle point‑cloud effect only.

unknowns: Point sampling kernel and density function
TSL shader constants, blending, fog, tonemapping
educated_guesses: Alpha decreases with depth; far points desaturate
Additive or alpha blending; ACES/Reinhard tonemapping
Bilateral depth smoothing; hole fill by NN/inpaint
